opensearchserverless.accesspolicy.CfnAbo: Creates a data access policy for OpenSearch Serverless. Access policies limit access to collections and the resources within them, and allow a user to access that data irrespective of the access mechanism or network source. For more information, see [Data access control for Amazon OpenSearch Serverless](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/opensearch-service/latest/developerguide/serverless-data-access.html).

opensearchserverless.accesspolicy.Policy.Description: The JSON policy document without any whitespaces.

opensearchserverless.accesspolicy.Type.Description: The type of access policy. Currently the only option is `data`.
